actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The manticore makes three attacks, using Rend or Tail Spike in any combination.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail Spike
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 100/200 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.environment: Mountains, cliffs, rocky terrain, ancient ruins, territorial lairs
tactical_info.tactics: Uses flight for positioning advantage, alternates between tail spikes at range and rending claws in melee, multiattack flexibility
tactical_info.weaknesses: Limited intelligence affects tactical complexity, vulnerable to ranged attacks when grounded
